title: asperula glomerata subsp. bijarensis
intro: Asperula glomerata subsp. bijarensis, also known as woodruff, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asperula glomerata subsp. bijarensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Asperula glomerata subsp. bijarensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
